description: Our Java App is failing to build. The docker base images are ancient and removed from Docker Hub. Look at 'app/atsea-shop.Dockerfile', identify the 'node', 'maven', and 'java' images, and replace them with standard base images compatible with Java 8 / Maven 3.9 / Node 16. Then run_build=True to check your work.

initial_files.app/atsea-shop.Dockerfile:
FROM node:latest AS storefront

FROM maven:3.6-eclipse-temurin-8 AS appserver

FROM java:8-jdk-alpine AS runtime

initial_log: ERROR: failed to pull manifest for docker.io/library/java:8-jdk-alpine: not found

checks.error_msg: Node image should be node:16-alpine to fix openssl.
Maven image needs 3.9 to support eclipse-temurin-8.
java:8-jdk-alpine is dead. Need a modern alternative like eclipse-temurin:8-jre-alpine.
